response.justification: While Maria possesses strong TypeScript, full-stack, and clean code expertise that technically aligns with the role, she is dramatically overqualified as a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level position. This creates misalignment on compensation expectations, career trajectory, and retention risk—the company is seeking someone to grow into the role, not an established technical leader who will quickly outpace it.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript and full-stack experience across Node.js, React, and modern architectures
Demonstrated commitment to software craftsmanship, clean code, and mentoring through teaching and open-source work
Proven ability to work across diverse technical stacks and adapt quickly to new technologies
concerns: Massive overqualification for an entry-level role—currently a Staff engineer with 15+ years experience, creating retention and compensation alignment risk
PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned in experience; primary database work focuses on MongoDB and NoSQL
No explicit mention of Nest.js, AWS-specific services (ECS, EKS, RDS, S3, SQS), or ML/LLM experience listed in job's nice-to-haves
